title: High Pressure Shower Heads Hard Water Filter Shower Head 4-Setting Shower Head with 1.5m Shower Hose and Shower Stand Massage Water Saving Large Shower（Black）
features: High-quality materials: Made from premium ABS material, this showerhead is durable and resistant to damage even if dropped. The outer shell is constructed with multi-layer PVC gunmetal grey, offering scratch resistance and preventing paint peeling. The materials are sturdy and built to last.
Filter showerhead: The showerhead is equipped with a high-quality PP filter cartridge, effectively removing residual impurities from the water to provide a clearer and healthier shower experience.

High-pressure showerhead: The filter showerhead can withstand high pressure, addressing the issue of low water pressure. The internal structure of the showerhead is well-designed, with evenly distributed water outlets.

4 adjustable modes: The professional showerhead offers 4 adjustable modes, including a powerful jet mode (for massage and relaxation), a mist mode (gentle on the skin with moderate water density), and a mixed mode (simulating the sensation of rain enveloping your body). Simply turn the rear knob of the high-pressure showerhead to easily switch between modes.

Includes shower hose and shower bracket: This powerful showerhead comes with a 1.5-metre shower hose and a hole-free shower bracket, which can be easily installed on bathroom walls. The bracket is waterproof, has strong load-bearing capacity, and a long service life. The showerhead with a pause switch can be adjusted by 90° to achieve multi-directional showering effects.
Caution: The water pressure in spray gun mode is relatively high. Please take care not to direct it towards the human body, as it may cause injury to sensitive areas such as the eyes.
